title: Snowpiercer
tmdbOverview: In a future where a failed global-warming experiment kills off most life on the planet, a class system evolves aboard the Snowpiercer; a train that travels around the globe via a perpetual-motion engine.
synopsis: Released in 2013, Snowpiercer is a action, science fiction and drama film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
